content.text1: Our range of services includes all surgical instruments such as scissors, chisels, clamps, needle holders and container systems. As an independent repair company, we guarantee professional repairs. We confirm this with our repair logo on your instruments.
content.text2: You can rely on our expertise and experience in the repair of all surgical instruments. Our dedicated team ensures that your repair orders are processed quickly so that you can make full use of your instruments again as soon as possible. As a manufacturer-independent repair company, we stand for professional repairs that meet the highest quality standards. Our repair logo on your instruments is a sign of our expertise and your demand for quality.
content.title: Our in-house repair service guarantees that your repair orders are processed quickly

seo.description: Our range of services includes all surgical instruments such as scissors, chisels, clamps, needle holders and container systems. As a manufacturer-independent repair company, we guarantee professional repairs in-house.
seo.title: Repair and refurbishment of surgical instruments and container systems
